titleStmt.title: SII 24.127: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 127. (A.R. No. 63 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records an endowment in money for a lamp in the temple by Periya Tiruśuṭṭi-śāttiṉa Perumāḷ alias Rājarāja Uttama-śeṭṭi of Kuraṭṭippaṭṭaṉam situated in Kaivāra-nāḍu, a sub-division of Poyśaḷa-nāḍu. The record is dated in the 9th regnal year of the king Tribhuvaṉachchakravartigaḷ Rājādhirājadēva who may be identified with Rājādhirājadēva II on palaeographical considerations.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī Irājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 9Āvatu
poycaḷanāṭṭu kai(kay)vāra nāṭṭuk kuṟaṭṭippaṭṭaṉattu Irukkum parate
ceṭṭi makaṉ periyaperumāḷukku periya tirucuṭṭicāttiṉa perumāḷāṉa Irājarāja
Uttama ceṭṭiyeṉ pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkapperumāḷ koyi
lil periya tirumaṇṭapattu devāsaṉattu vaṭakkil Iraṇṭām pattiyilt tiru muṉpil
kālile Oru tiruviḷak keriyak kaṭavatāka śrīpaṇṭārattu Upaiyattukku Oṭukkiṉa
kācu 7 10 kācu 1 kku tiṅkaḷ kālcciṉṉap policai polivatāka poliṉta kācu 4va�
kku kācu 1 kkut tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāl Iru nāḻi vilaippaṭiyāka vaṉta ney Eṇṇāḻi muvuḻa
kkum Eṟilum tāḻilum nittam Uḻakku ney caṉtirātitta varai Eriyak kaṭavatāka viṭ
ṭeṉ perumāḷc ceṭṭiyeṉ Ittiruviḷakku śrīvaiṣṇavarakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 24.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
